nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template environment file listing required runtime configuration variables (app metadata, JWT/secret settings, bcrypt rounds, database URL, and CORS origins) for the FastAPI backend.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview and setup guide for Barstock covering the tech stack, step-by-step backend/frontend installation, database migration, initial superadmin/shop creation, login, staff account creation, environment variables, testing, and project layout.

nodes.name: alembic.ini
nodes.summary: Alembic database migration tool configuration defining the migration scripts location, logging setup, and database connection settings for schema versioning.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose definition provisioning a single Postgres 16 Alpine container (barstock-db) with a health check and a persistent named volume for local development of the Barstock backend.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-service compose file scoped to just the Postgres dependency; the app itself runs outside the container during development.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python project configuration defining package metadata, dependencies and optional dependency groups, console scripts, build system (Hatch), and tool configuration for ruff linting, pytest, and coverage.
